data_pipelines.registration: HTML Form -> Vanilla JS -> Firestore Document Creation -> Auto-increment Bid Number Return

ag_agent_guardrails.editing_protocol: Native IDE file-editing tools ONLY. Terminal editors (sed, awk, echo) are STRICTLY FORBIDDEN.
ag_agent_guardrails.terminal_autonomy: Pre-authorized for safe, read-only terminal commands ONLY (cat, grep, ls).
ag_agent_guardrails.execution_checkpoint: Code First, Deploy Second. Stop and report 'Code Complete' locally. DO NOT use browser subagents unless explicitly prompted. Wait for human 'Approved' command to run `firebase deploy`.
ag_agent_guardrails.scope_lock: No unprompted refactoring. Only alter exact lines necessary for the stated mission.
